Name: HitMtrlParam
Description: Determines the parameters applied upon hitting various materials.

Fields.Name: AI Volume Rate
Fields.Description: Normal when 1x. When set to 0, the sound radius becomes 0 (SE and SFX are unrelated game-like parameters).

Fields.Name: 0: On Hit - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: When this hit material is hit, this SpEffect is applied to the character.

Fields.Name: 1: On Hit - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: When this hit material is hit, this SpEffect is applied to the character.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Height Type
Fields.Description: The height at which to generate the foot effect when hitting this material.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Direction Type
Fields.Description: The direction in which to generate the foot effect when hitting this material.

Fields.Name: Floor Height Type
Fields.Description: Determines the floor height for this hit material. For floating items such as the surface of the water

Fields.Name: Disable Fall Damage
Fields.Description: If ON, hitting this material will not cause fall damage.

Fields.Name: Is Hard Material for Sound Reverb
Fields.Description: If ON, impacting this material is treated as a hard material for sund reverb.

Fields.Name: Hardness Type
Fields.Description: The hardness of the material upon impact. Used for soft contact processing of rigid bodies.

Fields.Name: Wet Timing
Fields.Description: Controls whether the whole body gets wet when stepping on the floor material, or whether it gets wet if specified by TAE.

Fields.Name: Wet: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material makes the target wet.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 2)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 2.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 3)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 3.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 4)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 4.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 5)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 5.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 6)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 6.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 7)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 7.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: SpEffect ID (Journey 8)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 8.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 2)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 2.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 3)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 3.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 4)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 4.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 5)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 5.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 6)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 6.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 7)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 7.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: SpEffect ID (Journey 8)
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when this material is hit during Journey 8.

Fields.Name: Vehicle Speed Influnce %
Fields.Description: The influence rate this material applies to vehicles. Vehicle Set Speed ​​* Influence Rate = Vehicle Speed

Fields.Name: Hit Material Replacement: Rain
Fields.Description: The hit material ID to use during rain. -1 means no change is made.
